title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVII. Relics.
content:
To market, to market, a gallop, a trot,
        To buy some meat to put in the pot;
        Threepence a quarter, a groat a side,
        If it hadn't been kill'd, it must have died.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
